title: CommandCookies Electronic Mod
description: A electronic mod designed to add prop electronics.
body:
Welcome to CEM, also known as CommandCookies Electronic Mod — a mod focused on adding prop-style electronics to Minecraft. It's currently in development with more features on the way. Here's what’s planned for the near future:

## - Planned Features -

📞 Working Phones
(Phones that do more than just look cool — real functionality coming soon!)

💡 RGB Smart Lights

🎮 Modern Gaming Consoles (PlayStation, Xbox, etc.)

🕹️ Retro Consoles (NES, PS1, SNES, etc.)

🔌 Chargeable Phones

📱 Older iPhone Models (15, 14, etc.)

📱 Samsung Galaxy Models

🧱 Circuits

📲 iPad Models

💻 MacBook Laptops

🖥️ Computers



Want to suggest something? join our discord server for updates, suggestions, and beta releases!
